patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses the overfitting by using a more robust algorithm to wrap text, avoiding hardcoded values and using dynamic calculations, adding more test cases to cover edge cases, and fixing the root cause of the bug rather than just a symptom.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by an infinite loop in the renderWrappedText method, which occurs when the text parameter is too long for a single line. The method keeps trying to wrap the text and append it to the StringBuffer, but since it never reaches the end of the text, it keeps throwing the RuntimeException and never returns.
